title: Japanese-Style Beef Kabanos Skewers with Roasted Vegetable Crumble
description: A fusion twist on traditional Japanese cuisine, featuring tender beef kabanos skewers paired with a roasted vegetable crumble.
instructions: Cut beef kabanos into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
Grill the beef kabanos for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Meanwhile, cut Argentinian beef flank steak into 1-inch cubes and marinate in a mixture of soy sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the beef cubes for 3-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Toss roasted vegetables with sesame oil and season with salt and pepper.
To make the crumble topping, mix together almonds, breadcrumbs, and grated Parmesan cheese.
Sprinkle the crumble topping over the roasted vegetables and serve with beef skewers and grilled beef cubes.
